---
title: "Past Funding"
listing:
  id: funding-records-listing
  contents:
    - "*.md"
    - "*/*.md"
  type: table
  sort: "start_date desc"
  sort-ui: [start_date, funder, amount]
  filter-ui: [funder, status, categories]
  categories: true
  fields: [title, lead_display, funder, start_date, end_date, amount, status, categories]
  field-display-names:
    lead_display: "Lead(s)"
    start_date: "Start"
    end_date: "End"
    amount: "Amount"
  page-size: 25
---

This page lists completed and ongoing funding for Bioconductor-related work. Contribute a new
entry by copying [`_templates/funding-record-template.md`](https://github.com/Bioconductor/funding-hub/blob/main/_templates/funding-record-template.md).
See [funding opportunities](../funding-opportunities/funding-opportunities.qmd) for open calls.
